metaDescription.description: Scientific publication editor and rich-text namespace for Ring Platform.

page.initialChat:
👋 Hello! I'm your AI research assistant. I can help with:

• Writing and editing
• Literature search
• Citation formatting
• Methodology structuring

What shall we start with?
page.chatStubResponse:
🔍 Thank you for your question! Here are my recommendations...

To improve your text, I suggest:
1. Add more source citations
2. Clarify the research methodology
3. Expand the results section

Would you like me to help with a specific section?
page.importDocumentDesc: Upload a file to import into the editor (PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, MD)
page.dragDrop: Drag and drop a file here or click to browse
page.readyToProcessDesc: Click "Process" to import the document into the editor. This will replace current content.

toolbar.linkDialogDesc: Enter the URL for the link
toolbar.imageDialogDesc: Enter the URL for the image
toolbar.tableDialogDesc: Choose the number of rows and columns

versionHistory.title: Version History
versionHistory.description: Restore a previous version or save a snapshot.
versionHistory.saveFirst: Save the document first to see version history.

onboarding.welcome:
👋 Welcome to **Zemna.AI**! I'm your AI research assistant.

I'll help you create world-class scientific publications. Let's start by setting up your paper.

**What's the title of your research?**
onboarding.askAuthors:
Excellent topic! 📚

Now, **who should be listed as author(s)?**
(You can list multiple authors separated by commas)
onboarding.askInstitution:
Perfect!

**Which institution or affiliation** should I add?
onboarding.completed:
🎉 Your publication is configured!

📄 **{title}**
✍️ {authors}
🏛️ {institution}

I've pre-filled standard scientific sections for you. You can:
• Start writing in any section
• Ask me for help with structure or content
• Import an existing document

**What would you like to work on first?**
onboarding.welcomeBack:
👋 Welcome back! Continuing work on **"{title}"**.

How can I help you today?

responses.abstract:
📝 For a strong abstract, include:

1. **Context** - Why is this research important?
2. **Purpose** - What did you investigate?
3. **Methods** - How did you do it?
4. **Results** - What did you find?
5. **Conclusions** - What does it mean?

Would you like help with a specific part?
responses.methodology:
🔬 For the methodology section, I recommend:

• **Research Design** - qualitative/quantitative/mixed
• **Sample** - who/what was studied
• **Data Collection** - instruments and procedures
• **Analysis** - statistical methods
• **Ethics** - approvals and consent

What type of research are you conducting?
responses.default:
🔍 Thank you for your question! I can help with:

• Structuring sections
• Literature search
• Citation formatting
• Text editing

What specifically would you like to work on?

metadataRail.title: Publication metadata
metadataRail.author: Author
metadataRail.editingAccessDesc: Create an account to edit, save, and export this document.

templates.defaultDocument:
Your Research Title

Author: [Your Name] • Institution: zemna.ai • Date: {date}

Abstract

Write your research abstract (150-300 words). The abstract should contain a brief summary of the main points: purpose, methods, results, and conclusions.

Introduction

Describe the research context, scientific problem, and objectives. Establish the relevance of the topic and formulate the main research questions.

Methodology

Describe research methods, sample, and analysis procedures. Explain in detail how data was collected and processed.

Results

Present your research findings. Use tables and figures to visualize your data effectively.

Discussion

Interpret results and discuss their implications. Compare with other research findings and explain potential discrepancies.

Conclusion

Summarize key conclusions and recommendations. Note research limitations and directions for future research.

References

Add your references in APA, MLA, or another citation format.
